overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit futuristic city at dusk. The player moves through an open plaza past a circular food stall, then along sidewalks lined with holographic advertisements and storefronts, finally crossing a street intersection with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic including neon signs and elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with circular neon food stall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward the circular JAPAN food stall, observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench near the plaza edge

entered.detail: circular food kiosk with bright red neon JAPAN signage and purple underlighting
vertical neon sign with cyan text on building facade
yellow concrete seating structures with pedestrians resting
tall vertical neon sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at dusk, dominated by a circular JAPAN food stall glowing with red and purple neon. The camera moves forward through the open concrete space, passing yellow benches on the left while futuristic glass towers rise in the background. Sparse pedestrians are scattered throughout the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corridor with elevated highway and giant billboard

events.description: exits the open plaza into a narrower street corridor with overhead elevated highway structures

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the food stall and entering the street area, moving toward the large digital billboard

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera wearing a hat and vest

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying a face advertisement on a skyscraper
overhead concrete highway ramp with support columns crossing above the street
tall palm tree lining the street sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving past the JAPAN stall, the scene transitions into a street corridor framed by massive elevated highway structures overhead. A giant digital billboard displaying a face dominates the center background, while palm trees line the right side. The pavement remains concrete as the camera moves through this more enclosed urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and holographic ads

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with green neon 'MATTERHORN SWISS' signage and dark facade
standalone digital advertising display with 'WILD SEX' text and holographic elements
green neon circular sign for CHILLAX establishment

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a narrow commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts. The MATTERHORN SWISS building with its distinctive green neon signage occupies the left, while various holographic advertisements and a digital kiosk appear on the right. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights, and sparse traffic moves along the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with yellow crosswalk and traffic

events.description: stepping onto the yellow striped crosswalk and beginning to cross the street

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the setting sun

notable_agents.action: standing at the corner waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large horizontal billboard with 'SET SAIL' text and purple neon accents
vertical traffic signal pole with red light illuminated

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide intersection as the camera approaches and enters a yellow-striped crosswalk. The setting sun creates a warm backlight between the towering buildings. The SET SAIL billboard dominates the left side while traffic lights and moderate vehicle traffic occupy the right. The camera moves steadily across the asphalt crosswalk toward the glowing sunset gap.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a wide open plaza into a dense urban corridor and finally toward a glowing sunset intersection. It begins by moving across a concrete plaza past a circular food stall glowing in red and purple neon, with futuristic glass towers looming in the background. As the camera pushes forward, the open space shifts into an enclosed urban canyon framed by massive elevated highways and a giant digital billboard. The scene then narrows onto a commercial sidewalk where wet pavement reflects the green neon of the Matterhorn Swiss building and various holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera emerges from the corridor to cross a yellow-striped intersection, moving steadily across the asphalt toward a warm backlight created by the setting sun between towering skyscrapers.
